upstream_note: v2: full 6x6. Top-level cells are the openai-egress row for v1 compatibility; the full grid is under upstreams.<egress>.cells keyed by ingress dialect.
egress_configured: openai openai-responses anthropic gemini cohere bedrock

openai.verdict_note: HTTP 200, passthrough (same dialect, no translation required); round trip to the mock's openai endpoint confirmed

openai-responses.verdict_note: UNTRANSLATED passthrough mock canned openai-responses body (sentinel id present); the gateway proxied /v1/responses through verbatim instead of translating (HTTP 200)

anthropic.verdict_note: HTTP 500 on POST /v1/messages: bad no anthropic envelope ("type":"message" + content array)

gemini.verdict_note: HTTP 404 on POST /v1beta/models/anthropic/mock:generateContent: bad no candidates[0].content

cohere.verdict_note: HTTP 500 on POST /v1/chat: bad no cohere v2 chat envelope (message.content or text)

bedrock.verdict_note: HTTP 404 on POST /model/anthropic/mock/converse: bad no output.message.content (Converse)
